properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Father of kindness You have poured out of grace You brought me out of darkness You have filled me with peace Giver of mercy You're my help in time of need Lord I can't help but sing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Faithful, you are Faithful, forever, you will be Faithful, you are All your promises are Yes and Amen All your promises are Yes and Amen

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Beautiful saviour You have brought me here You pulled me from the ashes You have broken every curse Blessed redeemer You have set this captive free Lord I can't help but sing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will rest In your promises My confidence Is your faithfulness
